testcase.name: Names shorter than or equal to 3 characters should just be uppercased
Scores should persist across separate ScoreManager instances (simulating app restart)
getLowestHighScore should return 0 when the list is empty
High score list should stay sorted in descending order of score
getLowestHighScore should return the smallest score currently stored
isHighScore should return false for a score lower than the lowest of a full top-5 list
Only the top 5 scores should be kept after adding a 6th entry
Names longer than 3 characters should be truncated to 3 and uppercased
Any score should count as a high score when fewer than 5 entries exist
Adding a score should make it retrievable from the high score list
isHighScore should return true for a score higher than the lowest of a full top-5 list
A fresh ScoreManager with no file should start with an empty list
